name: Orlix B20 Token Skill
description: Create, validate, and deploy B20 tokens on Base through Orlix AI. Asset & Stablecoin variants, supply caps, role-based access, compliance policies (allowlist, blocklist, freeze).

demo.title: orlix-b20-demo.sh
demo.code:
# Prepare a B20 Asset token deployment
curl -X POST https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "action": "prepare",
    "name": "BNKR Token",
    "symbol": "BNKR",
    "variant": "asset",
    "decimals": 18,
    "supply_cap": "1000000000",
    "admin": "0xYOUR_WALLET",
    "policies": { "blocklist": true }
  }'

# Validate config only
curl -X POST https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{ "action": "validate", "name": "My Token", "symbol": "MTK", "admin": "0x..." }'

# Get B20 standard info
curl 'https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill?action=info'

# Get full tool manifest (Claude + OpenAI format)
curl 'https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill?action=manifest'

setup: No setup required — the API is open and does not require authentication
POST to https://orlixai.xyz/api/b20-skill with action=prepare and your token config
The skill returns a validated config, deterministic address preview, and deployment params
B20 deploys go live when Base activates the standard — save the config and deploy then
For a visual configurator, use the B20 Studio at https://orlixai.xyz/b20

actions.name: prepare
actions.description: Validate config + return deployment bundle (address preview, params, deployment data)

actions.name: validate
actions.description: Validate config only — returns errors and warnings

actions.name: info
actions.description: B20 standard status, variants, and features

actions.name: manifest
actions.description: Full tool schema in Claude + OpenAI function-calling format
